content:
type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py
summary: Done: dict-based dynamic defaults on Option (validate in __init__, store as _dynamic_default, resolve via new Option._resolve_dynamic_default + Command._resolve_dynamic_defaults second pass after parse_args loop), plus (dynamic) help text. No changes to Parameter base signature or Option.process_value.
